composite_description: No drawdown signal. Conditions do not meet any entry threshold.
brief:
NO ACTION WARRANTED

Market conditions do not justify entry. BTC is in confirmed BEAR phase, 18.4% below the 200d MA, with no drawdown signal present. The z-score (+0.23) shows no panic selling. Without crisis-level dislocation, BEAR phase offers no reliable near-term edge; backtest data shows unfiltered BEAR entries average -6.2% at 120 days.

Structural risk is active: BTC sits 49.1% below the 1yr high, breaching the -35% filter threshold. Realised volatility at 35% is also below the 40% floor, signalling regime rigidity rather than opportunity. Both conditions independently warrant stand-aside. Shorts are well-funded (negative funding rate), and Fear & Greed remains subdued at 18 - consistent with consensus weakness. Wait for either a crisis-level z-score (below -3.0) with structural filters clearing, or confirmation of bull-phase re-entry above the 200d MA.
